_about: Demo-drivable registry pairing each enterable hypothesis with the real wired dataset it runs against and its cited, saved-report verdict. ADDITIVE — does not modify app/demo_data.json or any frozen-seam file. Every number cites a report in reports/. Regenerate verdicts by running the listed script; numbers here are snapshots as of 2026-07-12. AD-vs-CN imaging n updates to 494 AD once the AD-expansion embed merges into adni:neurojepa.

schema.claim: how it maps to contract.Claim(target, group_a/b)
schema.dataset: loaders.load(name) it runs against + n and cohort
schema.expected: the verdict card the gauntlet returns (AUC, 95% CI, permutation p, leakage/anchor, verdict) — all from a saved report

hypotheses.hypothesis: AD is decodable from the frozen structural-MRI embedding (AD vs CN).

dataset.name: adni:neurojepa
dataset.positives: 87 AD / 503 CN (expands to 494 AD after the AD-expansion merge)

expected.headline: The tool catches its own feeder cheating.
expected.leakage: RAW cohort/scanner leakage AUC 0.9996 (separable = batch artifact) -> referee de-rates; after ComBat leakage drops to 0.563 and pooled AD-vs-CN holds at 0.861 [0.829, 0.892]
expected.ad_expansion_precision_note: 5.7x AD expansion (87->494) HALVED the CI (0.081->0.039, audited sqrt(n) gain) but did NOT improve discrimination or de-confound: scanner-matched 3T-only AUC 0.861 [0.835,0.885] ~= 0.857 baseline (+0.004); raw pooled 0.891 is inflated ~0.03 by field-strength confound (40% added AD are 1.5T, 100% CN are 3T; embedding reads field strength at AUC 0.990). Report 0.861 (3T-matched), not 0.891. See reports/AD_EXPANSION_ANALYSIS.md
expected.verdict: FRAGILE / not promoted on the raw embedding (scanner artifact); the de-confounded, biomarker-anchored signal is what survives

hypotheses.why_meaningful: A flashy 0.85-0.94 imaging AUC is exposed as mostly acquisition batch before anyone ships it. This is the flagship rigor story.

hypotheses.hypothesis: MCI->AD conversion is decodable from ADNI structural features.

expected.verdict: PROMOTED - robust enough for follow-up; a real-but-modest prognostic signal

hypotheses.why_meaningful: Prognosis is harder than diagnosis; a cross-validated, permutation-significant AUC above chance is a genuine structural signal, reported with honest uncertainty.

hypotheses.hypothesis: The frozen MRI embedding's AD axis reflects tau biology (plasma p-tau217), not just scanner.

expected.verdict: The frozen MRI representation encodes tau signal -> the imaging AD axis is partly real biology, not purely batch artifact (the survivor of the KILL)

hypotheses.why_meaningful: Grounds the imaging phenotype in an independent molecular axis; this is what pulls the killed diagnosis card partly back toward real AD biology.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Adding imaging (NeuroJEPA) to plasma improves MCI->AD conversion prediction.

expected.verdict: NO CI-supported gain over plasma alone (plasma dominates, gate 0.50). HONEST NEGATIVE - complementarity, not superiority
expected.corroborating: adni_conversion_multimodal: best fusion 0.827 vs plasma 0.814, not CI-separable at n=498

hypotheses.why_meaningful: The tool refuses an overclaim its own CIs don't support. Owning this is the credibility move.

hypotheses.hypothesis: The AD imaging signal generalizes to an independent cohort (OASIS), not just held-out ADNI.

expected.verdict: Honest OUT-OF-COHORT transfer number (small OASIS AD n) - generalization is MEASURED, not assumed; pooling only valid after ComBat drops cohort-separability toward chance

hypotheses.why_meaningful: Directly answers 'how do you know it generalizes?' with an a-priori external-cohort number instead of internal CV. AIBL/NACC are the next drop-ins.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Which druggable protein targets does the tau-anchored imaging phenotype prioritize for AD?

dataset.name: discovery adapters
dataset.cohort: STRING PPI + LINCS L1000 reversal + Boltz-2 structure, routed from the plasma anchor

expected.output: ranked druggable targets (e.g. APP, MAPT, BACE1, APOE) with per-target evidence and a suggested wet-lab experiment
expected.verdict: A falsifiable target shortlist for the bench - these are HYPOTHESES to test, NOT outcome-validated drug targets

hypotheses.why_meaningful: The 'so what' - the pipeline hands the wet lab a biology-grounded shortlist, not a black-box classifier. This is the discovery-engine payoff.
